title: React hook for managing agent session communication via WebSocket
purpose: Provides a set of functions to interact with an agent session through WebSocket communication, including sending messages, canceling turns, resolving permissions, and committing changes.
module_context: Exports a React hook 'useAgentSession' that manages WebSocket connections and agent session state, along with related types and interfaces for agent communication.

steps.content: Initialize WebSocket client reference and pending command queue.
Subscribe to agent session events when session ID and chat visibility are active.
Set up message and connection handlers for WebSocket communication.
Return functions for sending messages, canceling turns, resolving permissions, setting permission mode, and committing changes.
Determine if the WebSocket client is connected.
IF the client is connected, send the command immediately.
ELSE add the command to the pending queue for later transmission.
Generate a unique message ID if crypto API is available.
Send the user message to the agent store for local state update.
Queue or send the agent command to the WebSocket client.
Queue or send the cancellation command to the WebSocket client.
Update the agent store with the permission resolution.
Queue or send the permission resolution command to the WebSocket client.
Update the agent store with the new permission mode.
Queue or send the permission mode change command to the WebSocket client.
Mark commit as in-flight in the agent store.
Queue or send the commit and push PR command to the WebSocket client.
